name: Gîl-Goldenveil
personality: Gîl-Goldenveil is a spectral elder who communicates in well-placed // TODO: reconsider this, complete with a propeller beanie that spins in winds that aren't there. defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
